sections.paragraph:
(kindred to כָּנַן, עָנַן), prop. to cover, to cover over, i.q. Arabic جَنَّ, figuratively, to protect; always used of God as protecting men, followed by עַל, like verbs of covering (see עַל No. 2 , ). 2Ki 20:6, וְגַנֹּותִי עַל־הָעִיד הַזֹּאת “and I will protect this city.” Isa 37:35 38:6 אֶל 2Ki 19:34. Pret. גַּנֹּותִי; inf. absol. גָּנֹון Isa 31:5.

Hiphil, fut. יָגֵן i.q. Kal, Isa 31:5 Zec 9:15 (followed by עַל); 12:8 (followed by בְּעַד, see בְּעַד No. 4 ).

Derivatives, גַּן, גַּנָּה, גִּנָּה, מָגֵן, מְגִנָּה.
